testCases.title: Enable loyalty, set mode=Mixed Cart, currency=PTS, save, reopen verify
testCases.failedAssertion: Precondition: Admin user logged in with loyalty:update permission
testCases.notes: Admin user (`admin` / `__administrator` role) lacks `loyalty:update` permission. JWT permissions contain only: builder:theme, builder:templates, sql-queries:*. The Save button in #loyaltySettingDetails blade has `disabled=disabled` with `va-permission="loyalty:update"` on the li element. Precondition unmet — cannot execute the test. INCIDENTAL DEFECT: `__administrator` role is missing the `loyalty:update` permission claim. This contradicts the expectation that the built-in administrator account has all module permissions. See bug entry below.

testCases.title: Verify loyalty mode dropdown has exactly 4 options
testCases.notes: Loyalty Mode dropdown observed showing exactly 4 options: Coupon Redemption, Loyalty Store, Mixed Cart, Payment Method. Screenshot captured.

testCases.title: GET /api/loyalty-setting/store/B2B-store returns current settings
testCases.notes: Admin Bearer token obtained. GET https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/api/loyalty-setting/store/B2B-store returned HTTP 200 with body: {"storeId":"B2B-store","loyaltyEnabled":true,"loyaltyMode":"Mixed Cart","loyaltyCurrency":"PTS"}. All 4 assertions pass: storeId=B2B-store, loyaltyEnabled=true, loyaltyMode=Mixed Cart, loyaltyCurrency=PTS.

testCases.title: PUT /api/loyalty-setting updates loyaltyMode to Loyalty Store; cleanup restores Mixed Cart
testCases.notes: BLOCKED by explicit user constraint: 'do NOT change loyalty store settings'. The test requires PUT /api/loyalty-setting with body {storeId:B2B-store, loyaltyEnabled:true, loyaltyMode:'Loyalty Store', loyaltyCurrency:PTS}, which would modify the live shared B2B-store loyalty settings. Auto-classifier confirmed block. Not a defect — user constraint enforced.

testCases.title: PUT /api/loyalty-setting with storefront user token returns HTTP 403
testCases.notes: BLOCKED by explicit user constraint: 'do NOT change loyalty store settings'. Even though the expected outcome is HTTP 403 (no change), the PUT request to /api/loyalty-setting targets live loyalty settings. Auto-classifier blocked the call. Not a defect — user constraint enforced.

testCases.title: GET /api/loyalty-setting/store/<unknown> returns HTTP 200 with null body (not 500)
testCases.notes: GET https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/api/loyalty-setting/store/NON_EXISTENT_STORE_XYZ_99999 with admin Bearer token returned HTTP 200 with body: null. Assertion passes: HTTP 200 (not 500), body is null/empty. API handles unknown storeId gracefully.

testCases.title: xAPI GraphQL store() query returns VirtoCommerce.Loyalty module with expected settings
testCases.notes: POST https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/graphql with query store(storeId:"B2B-store", cultureName:"en-US") { settings { modules { moduleId settings { name value } } } } returned HTTP 200. VirtoCommerce.Loyalty module found with: Loyalty.Enable=true, Loyalty.Mode="Mixed Cart", Loyalty.Currency="PTS", Loyalty.DefaultProductMultiplyFactor=1.0. All assertions pass.

testCases.title: Create Product Points Loyalty program, add product factor=2, verify persistence
testCases.notes: Navigated to Loyalty workspace > Add > Product Points Loyalty. Created program 'AGENT-TEST-ProductPoints-LOY026' with store=B2B-store, saved (count went 4→5). Opened Product factors widget > Add > searched 'Extended Warranty' > selected SEED-20260518-Extended Warranty — 2 Year (SKU: SEED-20260518-WARRANTY-EXT-001) > set factor=2 > Save. UI shows factor=2 persisted (row shows spinbutton value 2, 'New' label removed). API verification: POST /api/loyalty-program-product-factors/search returned totalCount=4, first result has productId=c51f2b73-ce80-4f1f-9ee9-e7cf35dec8eb, factor=2.00, createdBy=admin, createdDate=2026-06-09T18:07:46Z. All assertions pass.

bugs.title: __administrator role missing loyalty:update permission — Save button disabled for admin user in Loyalty settings blade
bugs.businessRule: BL-AUTH (admin should have all module permissions by default)
bugs.failedAssertion: Precondition: Admin user logged in with loyalty:update permission
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Log in as admin/Password1! to https://vcst-qa.govirto.com. 2. Navigate to Stores > B2B-store > Loyalty settings widget. 3. Attempt to change any loyalty setting and click Save.
bugs.expected: Admin user with __administrator role can save loyalty settings; Save button is enabled.
bugs.actual: Save button in #loyaltySettingDetails has disabled=disabled. DOM attribute va-permission="loyalty:update" on the Save li is not satisfied. JWT for admin contains permissions: [builder:theme, builder:templates, sql-queries:access, sql-queries:create, sql-queries:read, sql-queries:update, sql-queries:delete, sql-queries:reports]. The loyalty:update permission is absent.
